name: railway
description: Railway deployments and project configuration. Drop-in alternative to the Vercel adapter for projects hosted on Railway.

tools.name: railway_list_services
tools.description: List services in a project. A service is one deployable unit (web, worker, database, etc.).

tools.name: railway_list_deployments
tools.description: List recent deployments for a service. Returns status, commit, and deployment URL.

tools.name: railway_get_deployment_logs
tools.description: Fetch build and runtime logs. Used by the validator to diagnose deploy failures.

tools.name: railway_set_env
tools.description: Set an env var on a service. Sensitive values (SECRET/TOKEN/KEY in the name) are blocked by the hook — user-only.

tools.name: railway_redeploy
tools.description: Trigger a redeploy of a service. Used by the deployer after env-var changes.

envVars.name: RAILWAY_TOKEN
envVars.description: Railway API token from railway.app/dashboard → Account Settings → Tokens.
